generated_oml:
instance StructuralFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame component of lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance HoistMechanism : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hoist mechanism component of lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance Trolley : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Trolley component of lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance ControllerUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller unit component of lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance GantryCraneMotionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for motion data in gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for position data in gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneMotionSensor
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCranePositionSensor
]

instance MotionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motion data from gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for managing operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for message queuing and communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive data visualization dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveDataVisualizationService
]

instance PythonModulesC4Containers : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python modules bundling C4 Containers for system architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveDataVisualizationService
]

instance Fusion360CADModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for geometric representation of gantry crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryOptimizationService
]

instance CapellaSystemModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System modeling for architecture and behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService, OptimalTrajectoryOptimizationService
]

instance KiCadElectronicsDesign : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Electronics design tool for controller unit"
]

instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of gantry crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360CADModeling
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation of motion dynamics for gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaSystemModeling
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for motion trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryGeneration
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for operational state records"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLoggingInsight
]

instance InteractiveDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive data visualization for real-time and historical monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure synchronization accuracy between physical and digital states"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidation
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for container movement"
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for operational state records"
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization enabling operators to take appropriate actions"
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation via real-time sensor data monitoring"
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics support decision-making for logistics operations"
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are sent from the Control Application (Python) through the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane. Command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, and execution confirmations are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, employing containerization technologies for deployment and an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is utilized for signaling between digital twin services. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, and security protocols are not described in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a single personal computer (on-premise), with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. All software components run on this local machine, as the physical crane is connected directly to the computer and all system services execute locally."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Lab Scale Gantry Crane system adheres to the C4 Model standard for architectural visualization, employing context and container diagrams to describe its software architecture."
]
